use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in freelance marketplace interfaces
Showing avatar with automatic fallback to initials when image fails to load
Building user profile components with consistent avatar presentation
ai_summary: A set of reusable Avatar components built on Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images. Supports image display with automatic fallback to a styled placeholder when images fail to load. Part of a freelancer profile card design system, commonly used in SaaS platforms and creator marketplaces to represent user identities with clean, circular avatar presentation.
